MacIntuneManifest.Name: SCR-APP-104 - Install Microsoft 365 Apps
MacIntuneManifest.Description: Downloads and installs Microsoft 365 Apps for Mac (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, OneNote) from the official Microsoft download URL. Supports waiting for splash screen (Dialog/Octory) before installation, automatic update detection via HTTP Last-Modified headers, and can terminate running apps during install.
